# HL6 v2.0.0

## 中文

### 邮箱认证与账户迁移

- 全面切换为 HL6 自主管理的邮箱注册、验证、设置密码、登录、激活旧账户和找回密码流程。
- 密码采用 Argon2id 与服务端 Pepper 保护；会话版本控制会在密码变更后失效旧会话。
- v1 用户迁移后保持相同用户 ID、资料、头像、积分、域名、DNS、封禁、申诉、通知和其他关联数据，仅需通过原邮箱设置一次新密码。
- 注册支持不限制、精确后缀白名单和精确后缀黑名单；登录和资料更新不会覆盖用户自定义姓名或头像。
- 数字 QQ 邮箱在没有自定义头像时使用 HTTPS QQ 头像回退。

### 管理与安全

- 后台按访问与注册、站点与外观、邮件通知、支付与集成、Android 客户端、数据维护重新分类。
- 封禁邮件和封禁界面显示开始时间与预计解封时间。
- 新增受保护的 PostgreSQL ZIP 导出和覆盖恢复：恢复需要当前密码、一次性挑战、完整确认短语、格式校验、自动前置备份和维护模式。

### Android 客户端

- Android 使用本仓库本地构建的共享 UI，通过 API 直接完成邮箱认证和业务交互。
- 保留 Android Keystore 会话存储、服务端通信密钥、版本检查、更新公告、强制更新和直连 APK 分发。
- GitHub Actions 支持动态域名、通信密钥、名称、图标、版本号和包名，并输出签名验证后的直接 APK 与 SHA-256。

## English

### Email Authentication and Migration

- Replaced provider sign-in with HL6-owned email registration, verification, password setup, login, legacy-account activation, and password recovery.
- Passwords use Argon2id with a server-side pepper, and session-version checks invalidate prior sessions after password changes.
- Migrated v1 users retain the same user IDs, profiles, avatars, credits, domains, DNS records, bans, appeals, notifications, and linked data. They only need to set a password through their existing email address.
- Registration supports unrestricted, exact-domain allowlist, and exact-domain blocklist policies. Sign-in and profile updates never overwrite custom names or avatars.
- Numeric QQ mailboxes receive an HTTPS QQ avatar fallback only when no custom avatar exists.

### Administration and Safety

- Reorganized administration into access/registration, site/appearance, mail, integrations, Android client, and data-maintenance areas.
- Ban email and ban views include start time and expected unban time.
- Added guarded PostgreSQL ZIP export and overwrite restore with current-password verification, one-time challenge, exact confirmation, archive validation, mandatory pre-restore backup, and maintenance mode.

### Android Client

- Android packages the repository's local shared UI and uses direct APIs for email authentication and application data.
- Retains Android Keystore session storage, server-managed communication key, version checks, update notices, forced updates, and direct APK delivery.
- GitHub Actions accepts dynamic domain, communication key, name, icon, version, and package name, then produces a signature-verified direct APK with SHA-256.
